case_title: MAUREEN KEATING VS. SEAN MORIARTY et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEATING, MAUREEN
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST MAUREEN KEATING FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-08-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-25-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SEP-13-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-05-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-25-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. No sanctions. Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to government code section 68608(b). JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Continued To Sep-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Sep-13-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). *** JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Judge reviews late filing in open court. Self-represented Plaintiff Maureen Keating is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to Jun-07-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. *** NOTE: Self-represented Plaintiff ordered to pay outstanding sanctions by the next Order to Show Cause hearing. *** JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
